title: Jamaican Pan-Seared Squid
description: A quick and flavorful seafood dish featuring pan-seared squid served with a tangy Caribbean-inspired sauce.

ingredients.name: Squid tubes
ingredients.notes: Fresh or thawed, cut into 1-inch pieces

instructions: Rinse the squid pieces and pat dry with paper towels.
Season the squid with Jamaican jerk seasoning.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the squid to the skillet and sear for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the squid to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
Add the dark rum and apricot jam to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
Serve the squid with the sauce spooned over the top and garnished with chopped cilantro and a lime wedge.
